creator_profile_completion_info: Tell us about your skills, experience, and preferences to help clients find you.
enter_profile_title: e.g., Senior Web Developer, Creative Designer
profile_title_help: A brief title that describes your role or expertise
enter_short_bio: A brief description of your expertise
short_bio_help: A concise summary of your skills and experience
enter_bio: Tell us about yourself, your experience, and what you do...
bio_help: Share your story, experience, and what makes you unique
skills_description: Select the skills and technologies you're proficient in. This helps clients find creators with the right expertise for their projects.
skills_help: Choose the skills that best represent your expertise
portfolio_description: Showcase your best work to demonstrate your capabilities to potential clients.
portfolio_item_title_help: The title of your portfolio item
enter_portfolio_item_description: Describe the project, your role, and the technologies used
portfolio_item_description_help: Detailed description of the project and your contribution
portfolio_item_url_help: Link to the live project or demo
experience_description: Add your professional experience to build trust with potential clients.
duration_help: How long you worked in this role
job_description_help: What you accomplished in this role
preferences_description: Set your preferences to help match you with the right projects.
preferred_project_types_help: Types of projects you enjoy working on
preferred_budget_range_help: Budget range you prefer for projects
availability_help: When you're available for new projects
